lessons.title: Dance Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core dance system: Standard Step for party buffs, Technical Step for raid burst, and the rhythm of executing dance sequences.
keyPoints: Standard Step: 2-step dance, 30s recast, grants party damage buff
Technical Step: 4-step dance, 120s recast, aligns with raid burst
Execute steps by pressing the highlighted buttons in sequence
Both dances have timers - finish before they expire or lose the step
tips: Watch the step buttons - they glow when it's their turn in the sequence
Standard Step should be used on cooldown for maximum uptime

lessons.title: Proc Management
lessons.description: Master the Silken Symmetry and Silken Flow proc system, and understand Threefold Fan and Fourfold Fan from Flourish.
keyPoints: Silken Symmetry: Procs from Cascade, enables Reverse Cascade
Silken Flow: Procs from Fountain, enables Fountainfall
Both procs grant Feathers when consumed
Flourish grants all procs at once - use during burst windows
tips: Never let procs fall off - they're your main damage source
Flourish has a 60s cooldown - use every burst window

lessons.title: Esprit Gauge Mastery
lessons.description: Understand the Esprit gauge, Saber Dance spending, and preventing overcapping for maximum DPS.
keyPoints: Esprit builds from your and your partner's weapon skills
Saber Dance costs 50 Esprit - your highest potency GCD
Use Saber Dance at 80+ to prevent overcapping
Prioritize Saber Dance during buff windows
tips: In burst windows, use Saber Dance even at 50+ Esprit to fit more under buffs
Partner a high-CPM job (NIN, MNK) for faster Esprit generation

lessons.title: Feather Optimization
lessons.description: Master Feather accumulation and Fan Dance usage to maximize oGCD damage without overcapping.
keyPoints: Feathers come from consuming Silken procs (max 4)
Fan Dance I/II consume 1 Feather each
Never hold 4 Feathers - use one before consuming another proc
Hold 3 Feathers going into burst to dump during Devilment
tips: Fan Dance III procs from Fan Dance I - weave it immediately
Fan Dance IV procs from Flourish - high priority during burst

lessons.title: Burst Window Execution
lessons.description: Master the 2-minute burst: Technical Step -> Devilment -> Flourish timing and party coordination via IPC.
keyPoints: Burst sequence: Technical Finish -> Devilment -> Flourish
Devilment grants 15% crit/DH to you and your partner
Technical Finish grants 5% damage to all party members
Coordinate with party burst via IPC - announce your Technical
tips: Enter burst with 3 Feathers and 50+ Esprit for maximum output
Technical Finish is your party's 2-minute buff window - don't drift it

lessons.title: High-Level Abilities
lessons.description: Learn the powerful follow-up abilities: Starfall Dance, Finishing Move, Last Dance, and Tillana.
keyPoints: Starfall Dance: 600 potency proc from Devilment - high priority
Finishing Move: 850 potency proc from Standard Finish
Last Dance: 520 potency chained from Finishing Move
Tillana: 600 potency proc from Technical Finish
tips: These procs have limited duration - use them before they expire
Starfall Dance is your highest priority proc during Devilment

lessons.title: Partner & Party Coordination
lessons.description: Master Dance Partner selection, Shield Samba defensive utility, and coordinating with other Daedalus users.
keyPoints: Closed Position: Partner the highest DPS player (usually SAM/NIN/MNK)
Partner shares Esprit generation and receives Devilment buff
Shield Samba: 15% party mitigation for raidwides
Curing Waltz for emergency healing, Improvisation for shields
tips: Partner selection matters - they generate Esprit and get your Devilment
Shield Samba coordinates via IPC to avoid stacking with other mitigations
